notes: PENDING HUMAN REVIEW — WIN-014 verdict change from Misleading to Self-Contradicted. Do not self-apply. Curmudgeon c4 confirmed this at confidence 0.82, matching c3 recommendation (confidence 0.7). Apply only after human review.

patches.rationale: WIN-014 is WIN-012's mirror: both assert the same PRED-TIER-X test (10–13 µGal SG contact-phase pulse, Aug 2026) as the positive forward prediction, while claiming a historical null as confirmation. The structure is self-contradiction, not merely unfalsifiability. Curmudgeon c3 and c4 both recommend verdict_change matching WIN-012.

patches.replace: Self-contradicted: dome claims 2009 null confirms the model (WIN-014), while PRED-TIER-3 predicts a 10–13 µGal SG pulse in the same instrument class (Aug 2026). Whichever horn holds, the other fails.
patches.rationale: Summary table finding updated to reflect the stronger self-contradiction argument established in the evidence rewrite.

patches.find: Same unfalsifiable structure as WIN-013: the model claims credit for opposite outcomes across different experiments without advance specification of expected results.
patches.replace: The dome claims a 2009 null SG result confirms the model (WIN-014), while simultaneously predicting a 10–13 µGal SG contact-phase pulse at the Aug 2026 eclipse (PRED-TIER-3) using the same instrument class. This is not unfalsifiability — it is direct self-contradiction: if SG gravimeters demonstrate the null that confirms the model now, they cannot also demonstrate the positive pulse that will confirm it then. Whichever horn holds, the other fails. See WIN-012 for the analogous structure (PRED-TIER-2 vs Mohe historical signal). Cross-link: if Aug 2026 SG eclipse records a pulse, WIN-014 loses its evidential basis; if it records a null, PRED-TIER-3 fails.
patches.rationale: Verdict text rewritten to lead with the PRED-TIER-3 self-contradiction rather than the weaker unfalsifiability framing. Matches curmudgeon c4 H5 recommendation.

patches.find: Same unfalsifiable structure as WIN-013 — claiming opposite outcomes confirms the model either way.
patches.replace: Self-contradicted: the dome cannot simultaneously claim a null SG result confirms the model (2009) and predict a 10–13 µGal SG pulse in the same instrument class (PRED-TIER-3, Aug 2026).
patches.rationale: TLDR updated to lead with self-contradiction framing per curmudgeon c4 H12 recommendation.

patches.find: Same problem as WIN-013: the dome claims credit for a null gravity result at a Chinese station while simultaneously claiming positive detection elsewhere. No advance criteria specify which locations should show effects and which shouldn't.
patches.replace: The dome's PRED-TIER-3 commits to a positive 10–13 µGal SG contact-phase signal at the Aug 2026 eclipse — the same instrument class as the 2009 China null it claims as WIN-014. A null in 2009 and a positive pulse in 2026 cannot both confirm the model without specifying in advance what distinguishes them.
patches.rationale: TLDR evidence updated to surface the specific PRED-TIER-3 forward test that makes this a self-contradiction rather than mere unfalsifiability.
